name: cowork-workspace
description: The house rule for where things go in a Cowork environment. Everything agentic lives under one root, ~/Projects/Cowork: credentials in keys/, generated artifacts in artifacts/<project>/, settings at the root. Routes every write before it happens and keeps stray files out of $HOME, the Desktop, Downloads, /tmp, and a repo's tree. The same keys/ folder the read-only plugins read from.
